$comment: One signature ability per department. 'kind' tells the engine how to resolve it during settlement. magnitudeBp is in basis points. INFO/REBALANCE have no direct settlement multiplier (resolved earlier in the round loop by the FSM/UI).

abilities.name: Levy
abilities.description: Tax 15% of a rival's market gain this phase into your own treasury.

abilities.name: Intel
abilities.description: Peek at extra indicator data before allocating. No settlement effect.

abilities.name: Movement
abilities.description: Shift the whole market in one region by +12% — but every player invested there gains too.

abilities.name: Rebalance
abilities.description: Rebalance your allocation once after the event is revealed. Resolved before settlement.

abilities.name: Foresight
abilities.description: Read the true upcoming phase early. No settlement effect.
